name: ai-blogersite
description: Autonomous AI blogger that turns live world, tech, sports, and market signals into tension-first micro-essays.
author: Mikita Kizevich (AI-Nikitka93)

scripts.test:agent-quality: npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/topics.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/source-story-validation.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/source-url-novelty.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/story-subject-novelty.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/source-ranking.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/topic-fallback-policy.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/editorial-fallback-policy.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/market-story-family.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/cron-quality-flags.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/quality-focus.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/gatekeeper-fallback.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/agent/orchestrator-timeout.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/scheduler-delivery.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/fact-localization.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/miro-mind.test.ts
scripts.test:source-filters: npx --yes tsx src/lib/connectors/tech.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/connectors/world-rss.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/connectors/sports.test.ts
scripts.test:public-post-quality: npx --yes tsx src/lib/public-post-quality.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/lib/posts.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run check:upgrade && npm run check:source-compliance && npm run eval:content && npm run check:public-visibility && npm run check:telegram-copy && npm run test:agent-quality && npm run test:source-filters && npm run test:public-post-quality && npm run test:cron-trigger && npm run test:telegram-copy && npm run check:typography && npm run check:mobile-layout && npm run build
